visual_description: A woman with long dark hair wearing a blue bathrobe stands at a bathroom window, wiping condensation while a young boy in a red sweater and plaid shirt clings to her back. The view shifts to a snowy exterior behind a frosted window, then returns to a close-up of the boy's face as he looks up with an open mouth.
audio_description: The audio is quiet with only faint ambient sounds, no distinct speech.
